title: Myntra Fashion Product Scraper
description: Scrape public Myntra search and category pages for product catalog, price, discount, rating, image, and URL data.

searchQueries.title: Search Queries
searchQueries.description: Fashion product searches such as tshirts, jeans, sneakers, sarees, or kurtas.

categoryPaths.title: Category Paths
categoryPaths.description: Optional Myntra category paths or URLs, for example men-tshirts or https://www.myntra.com/women-kurtas-kurtis-suits.

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum products to save across all searches and category paths.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. Myntra can hide product data from datacenter traffic, so residential India proxy is enabled by default for reliable cloud runs.
